name: src-edit-proposal-rigor
description: Strict Codex-style workflow for Prometheus self-source edits, including evidence-first proposals and the dev-only request_dev_source_edit fast approval flow.

resources.description: Concrete example/template for proposals that collapse a special runtime mode back into normal main-chat tool-category routing.
Guardrail for src proposals when ProposalStore source-read evidence validation ignores snake_case executor_prompt.
Guardrail for resuming src/package migration work after a gateway restart: verify actual approvals, command/source edits, dirty state, and pending build checks before summarizing.
Guardrail for Prometheus source edits: use source-relative paths with source tools, include all needed files in mutation scope, and recover from syntax-rejected edits by re-reading exact blocks.
How to use the dev-only request_dev_source_edit fast approval flow without bypassing Codex-style source-edit rigor.
Example of choosing request_dev_source_edit for a small web-ui fix, then syncing, verifying, and reporting.
Guardrail for choosing source-scoped vs workspace file search tools during Prometheus debugging investigations.
Guardrail for choosing web-ui-specific source tools and web-ui-relative paths after a generic source_stats path miss.
